name: center-form-export
label: Center Form Export
description: Exports form data for all subjects in a Flywheel group/project without a participant list
author: NACC

group_id.description: Flywheel group ID for the center

modules.description: Comma-separated list of form modules to include

formver_split.description: Split output CSVs by form version (one file per module/formver pair)

apikey_path_prefix.description: The instance specific AWS parameter path prefix for apikey

batch_size.description: Number of subject ids per query batch when gathering project data

reload_workers.description: Number of concurrent workers used to reload each batch's files
